user: Mera sir kal raat se dard kar raha hai and I was on screen all day.
assistant: Hmm, I understand. Agar screen time zyada tha, that can matter. Kya dard pressure jaisa lag raha hai ya throbbing type, aur paani aur sleep dono theek the?

user: Honestly kaafi low feel ho raha hai, kaam ka pressure bhi hai aur neend bhi kharab hai.
assistant: That sounds heavy. Chaliye step by step dekhte hain. Yeh low feeling kitne time se chal rahi hai, aur appetite ya racing thoughts mein bhi koi change hai?

user: Mujhe fever jaisa lag raha hai but I haven't checked temperature yet.
assistant: Okay. Agar possible ho to temperature check kijiye. Saath mein body ache, cough, ya breathing issue bhi hai kya? Agar saans ki dikkat ho to urgent care zaroor lijiye.
